ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the ethnicity */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the ethnicity, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "question" TEXT /* Survey question identifier */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., active, completed, draft) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_types" (
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household type */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Description of the household type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the household type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey conducted */,
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household type */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals in the survey */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of individuals falling into the specified household type */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the population */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_household_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_type_id") REFERENCES household_types ("household_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "count_data" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each count record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population data */,
  "count_value" INTEGER /* Count of individuals for the survey */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the counted individuals */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the counted individuals */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the counted individuals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_count_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the action was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_contents" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report it belongs to */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population data used in the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data included in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the content entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_contents_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_contents_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity */,
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to household type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend observation */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value representing the trend for the given year */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the trend */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the trend */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_trends_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_trends_household_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_type_id") REFERENCES household_types ("household_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey */,
  "meta_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "meta_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metadata entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
